overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal wooden dock settlement at night. The scene features atmospheric blue-green lighting, misty water, hanging lanterns, and scattered NPC villagers, with the character moving from covered walkways to an open waterfront pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway with merchant stalls

events.description: interaction prompt appears to speak with a villager standing by the wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered dock area, passing under wooden roof structures and alongside stone walls

notable_agents.action: male villager standing against the wall with a dialogue interaction available

entered.detail: wooden staircase leading up to an elevated platform attached to the building
tall stone wall with wooden beams forming the side of the dock structure
wooden roof beams and planks providing partial cover over the walkway
thick wooden post supporting the overhead roof structure
warm glowing lantern suspended from the roof providing local illumination
wooden market stall with orange cloth covering displaying goods
stack of wooden crates and barrels beside the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden dock area with overhead roof structures providing shelter. Warm lanterns hang from the beams, illuminating stone walls and wooden stairs on the left, while market stalls and crates line the right side. A villager stands near the wall with an available interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront dock platform with tribal buildings

events.description: exits the covered walkway and turns right onto the open dock with water visible
character turns right at the dock junction to follow the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: turning right at the dock junction and proceeding along the open waterfront boardwalk

notable_agents.action: villager standing behind a wooden counter at a market stall

entered.detail: misty dark water visible beyond the dock edge with distant reflections
large wooden tribal building with lit windows and red banners
coiled rope lying on the wooden dock planks
wooden barrel placed near the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open waterfront area, turning right along the dock. The sky is now visible with dark storm clouds, and misty water appears on the right. Tribal longhouses with warm lantern light line the left side, while rope coils and barrels dot the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock terminus with panoramic water view

events.description: character slows and stops at the end of the wooden dock pier
camera pans to reveal the expansive water view and distant mountain structures

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the dock and looking out at the misty water and distant structures, then panning to view the surrounding tribal buildings

entered.detail: thick wooden bollard wrapped with rope for mooring boats
tall rocky cliff face visible across the misty water
ancient tower ruin rising from the water in the distance
safety railing made of thick ropes along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks to the terminus of the wooden dock, where the view opens up to reveal expansive misty water and distant mountain cliffs. Ancient tower ruins are visible across the water. The character stops at the end of the pier, panning the camera to take in the panoramic view of the waterfront settlement and the stormy sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered tribal settlement that gradually opens into a vast, misty waterfront vista. It begins within a covered wooden dock area, moving past warm hanging lanterns, stone walls, and market stalls. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene expands into an open waterfront where the dark, stormy sky becomes visible and the path turns right along a pier lined with tribal longhouses and rope coils. The camera then follows the character to the terminus of the wooden dock, where the environment opens completely to reveal expansive misty waters and distant mountain cliffs. Finally, the movement settles at the edge of the pier, panning across the panoramic view of the settlement and the ancient tower ruins looming across the water.
